MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Sarfartoq Project in North America, Greenland dated January 2011.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Sarfartoq Project in North America, Greenland dated January 2011.pdf
document.description: The report focuses on the geological and exploration details, resource estimation, and recommendations for further exploration and development of the Sarfartoq Project in West Greenland, with an emphasis on Rare Earth Elements (REE) and diamondiferous kimberlite.
